name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the thermostat as it will appear in HomeKit.

serialNumber.title: Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Nefit Easy serial number (found in the Nefit Easy app under Settings > About).

accessKey.title: Access Key
accessKey.description: Nefit Easy access key (found in the Nefit Easy app under Settings > About).

password.title: Password
password.description: Nefit Easy password (set during initial app setup).

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll the thermostat for updates. Default is 60 seconds.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Log detailed debug information to the Homebridge log. Turn off in normal use.
